commands.repair_reason: - [P2] Needs contributor or maintainer proof and validation review rather than an automated repair; no concrete code defect was found in the small patch.; Cleared: The diff only swaps setup wizard cleanup calls and does not introduce dependency, credential, permission, or supply-chain changes. commands.review_summary:
The PR changes setup wizard retry/error handling to cancel the current gateway wizard session before disconnecting and before starting a fresh wizard session.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: a timed-out wizard.next reaches EnterWizardErrorAsync, which disconnects and nulls _client before any wizard.cancel can be sent, then Start wizard again starts a new session without cancelling the stale one. I did not run a live WinUI/gateway reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Needs contributor or maintainer proof and validation review rather than an automated repair; no concrete code defect was found in the small patch.
